Session 1 	Session 2 	Session 3
In this training, Dean is going to go through a list of what he believes are the foundational pieces for a winning business. After 30 years of being an
entrepreneur and a lot of trial and error, Dean has boiled down his must‐know business success secrets into a very quick and very easy to digest training
video for you!
S E S S I O N O V E R V I E W
TAKE NOTES
ACTION STEPS
Remember that you can never give up. Giving up is not an option for you and your dream future.
Make sure you never listen to others who aren’t qualified to give you advice.
Always remember to have marketing stamina in your business. Remember the saying “planes fly”.
Remember how important standard operating procedures can be to your business.
Always model those people achieving the level of life you desire.
Always be solution oriented when things go wrong in life.
